meaning: adj.[化]氧化的 具有氧化特性的
examples: High in fiber, this brown algae extract helps control liver and lung cancer, douses inflammation, and is anti-tumor and anti-oxidative.
Oxidative methylation of toluol to styrene is a new process.
The seasoning is thought to enhance an enzyme that protects the brain against oxidative damage.
One theory blames oxidative stress, caused by the onslaught of nasty molecules known as free radicals.
Mitochondrial DNA is much more prone to oxidative damage (due to its nudity) than genomic DNA (11).
